card.name: Remilia, the Scarlet Devil
card.text: Flying Scarlet Destiny — When Remilia enters, gain control of target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Knight of Nights
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gets +2/+0 and gains first strike, menace, deathtouch, and haste.

card.name: A Dream More Scarlet
card.text: Vampires and Youkai you control get +1/+0 and have ward—Pay 3 life.

card.name: Meiling, the Gatekeeper
card.text: Colorful Rain — {T}: Add {B} or {R}. Whenever this mana is spent to cast a creature spell with mana value 4 or greater, that creature enters with an additional +1/+1 counter.

card.name: Sakuya, the Head Maid
card.text: Flash Luna Dial — When Sakuya enters, draw two cards. You lose 2 life unless you control a Vampire or Youkai.

card.name: Cirno, Ice Spirit on the Lake
card.text: When Cirno enters, choose one — • Cirno deals 3 damage to target creature. • Put a +1/+1 counter on her. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Rumia, Wrapped in Dusk
card.text: Night Bird — {B}, Exile Rumia, Wrapped in Dusk from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Dangerous Curiosity
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has deathtouch. Whenever enchanted creature deals damage to an opponent, you may reveal the top card of your library and put that card into your hand. You lose life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Fog Sign
card.text: Tiered (Choose one additional cost) • Scarlet Shoot — {0} — Fog Sign deals 2 damage to any target. • Red Magic — {2} — Fog Sign deals 2 damage divided as you choose among one or two targets. • Mountain of a Thousand Needles — {4}{R} — Fog Sign deals 4 damage divided as you choose among any number of targets.

card.name: Scarlet Gensokyo
card.text: Create two 1/1 black and red Youkai creature tokens. Scarlet Gensokyo deals 2 damage to each player.

card.name: Fairy Menace
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, add {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Little Devil
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, up to one other target creature gets +1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Flandre, Sister of the Devil
card.text: Flying Lävatein — When Flandre enters, each opponent sacrifices a nontoken creature of their choice and discards a card.

card.name: Sun Sign 「Royal Flare」
card.text: Royal Flare deals 4 damage to target creature and 2 damage to its controller.

card.name: Fiction Sign
card.text: Tiered (Choose one additional cost.) • Old Illuminati — {0} — Surveil 1, then draw a card. • Reptilian Intelligence — {1} — Draw two cards, then discard a card. • New World Order — {4}{U} — Surveil 3, then draw three cards.

card.name: Aspect Shift
card.text: X target nonland permanents phase out. (Treat them and anything attached to them as though they don't exist until their controller's next turn.) Draw a card.

card.name: Otherland's Edge
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. It enters tapped unless you pay 2 life.

card.name: Forbidden 「Starbow Break」
card.text: Choose one — • Target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. • Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Yuiman, Data Purifier
card.text: Vigilance Yuiman can't attack or block unless you have seven or more cards in your graveyard. {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Wonder Stone
card.text: Flying Imprint — When this creature enters, exile a card from your graveyard. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, return the exiled card to your hand.

card.name: For the Glory of the Moon
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step. Enchanted creature has "At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, that player may surveil 1."

card.name: Toyohime, System Administrator
card.text: Flash When Toyohime enters, choose one — • Exile target enchantment. • Exile target graveyard. • Exile target creature, then return it to the battlefield at the beginning of your next upkeep.

card.name: Ubame, Yamanba Chief
card.text: Flash Cosmic Dust — When Ubame enters, untap another target creature you control.

card.name: Nareko, Confined Dousojin
card.text: Reach Logical Wall — {2}{U}, {T}: Surveil 1, then draw a card. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Unchanging Daily Life
card.text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Breach the Sanctuary
card.text: Untap target creature. It gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If it's your turn, draw a card.

card.name: Overflowing Wonder
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, exile another target creature or spell. Its controller may cast it for as long as it remains exiled.

card.name: Hallucinated Companion
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Asama Purifying Mountain
card.text: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature you control. At the beginning of your end step, you may exile four cards from your graveyard. When you do, create a token that's a copy of a creature you control, except it's a nonlegendary Illusion.

card.name: Ariya, Spirit of Permanence
card.text: Flying When Ariya enters, draw three cards. Unliving, Undying Stone — Whenever you draw a card, target creature you control gains indestructible until your next turn.

card.name: Copy 2MC
card.text: This token can be used to represent a copy of something else.

card.name: Lord Tenma's Command
card.text: Choose two — • Target player creates two 1/1 white Bird Youkai creature tokens with flying and vigilance. • Airbend target creature. (Exile it. While it's exiled, its owner may cast it for {2} rather than its mana cost.) • Lord Tenma's Command deals 5 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. • Two target players each draw a card.

card.name: Remote-Work Zashiki-Warashi
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain 2 life. Reinforce 1—{W} ({W}, Discard this card: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.) Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Silent Sinner in Blue
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create a 1/1 white Rabbit creature token. II — Exile up to two target creatures you control until this Saga leaves the battlefield. III — Create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying and a Food token.

card.name: Those Were Good Pills
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Curiosities of Lotus Asia
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Mill four cards, then you may return an artifact card from your graveyard to your hand. II — Investigate. III — You may sacrifice an artifact. When you do, scry X, where X is its mana value, then draw a card.

card.name: Kappa Tinkerers
card.text: Artifacts and other Artificers you control have "{4}, {T}: Draw a card."

card.name: The Gensokyo Chronicle
card.text: Instant and sorcery cards in your graveyard have flashback {2}{U}. (You may cast it from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.) Creature cards in your graveyard have encore {2}{U}. (Exile it and pay its encore cost: For each opponent, create a token copy that attacks that opponent this turn if able. They gain haste. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.) The Gensokyo Chronicle can be your commander.

card.name: Thirst for Companionship
card.text: Draw three cards. Then discard two cards unless you discard a legendary card.

card.name: Apparitions Stalk the Night
card.text: Target opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice. Create a 2/2 black Nightstalker creature token.

card.name: Forbidden Scrollery
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create two 1/1 black and red Youkai creature tokens. II — Each player sacrifices a creature of their choice. III — Return up to one target Human creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. It's no longer a Human.

card.name: Oni of the Night Parade
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature enters or deals combat damage to an opponent, up to one Human you control becomes a Deserter in addition to its other types. Create two 1/1 red and black Youkai creature tokens. Deserters you control get +2/+2 and have indestructible.

card.name: Reduce to Vapor
card.text: Exile target creature or enchantment. You lose 3 life.

card.name: Magic is All About Power
card.text: Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {2} more to cast. If an instant or sorcery spell you control would deal damage, it deals double that damage instead.

card.name: Visionary Fairies in Shrine
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — You may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards. II — Create two Treasure tokens. III — Sacrifice any number of artifacts, then amass Faeries X, where X is the number of artifacts sacrificed this way.

card.name: The White Rabbit's Trick
card.text: Until end of turn, target attacking creature you control can't be blocked except by target untapped creature defending player controls.

card.name: Helpful Hofgoblin
card.text: When this creature enters, untap another target creature you control. Until end of turn, it gets +1/+1 and gains vigilance and trample.

card.name: The Purest Sky and Sea
card.text: Search your library for a card with a basic land type, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Twin Spark
card.text: (You may cast a legendary instant only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.) Target creature you control gets +X/+0 until end of turn. It deals X damage to up to one target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Wild and Horned Hermit
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Search your library for a nonlegendary creature card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. II — Put two +1/+1 counters on up to one target creature. III — Until end of turn, target creature you control must be blocked if able and can't be blocked by more than one creature.

card.name: Aunn, Temple Helper
card.text: When Aunn enters, return up to one target God you control or God card in your graveyard to its owner's hand. Whenever a God you control enters, you gain 2 life and draw a card.

card.name: Aya, Reporter of Fantasy
card.text: Flash Flying, haste Candid Shot — When Aya enters, look at target player's hand and choose a card in it. That player reveals that card, and Aya deals damage to them equal to its mana value. {3}{U}{R}: Return Aya to her owner's hand.

card.name: Cheating Detective Satori
card.text: Menace Mind Reader — When Satori enters, for each opponent, that player reveals their hand and you investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.") {2}, {T}, Sacrifice a Clue: Exile target card from an opponent's graveyard. Until end of turn, you may cast that card and mana of any type may be spent to cast it.

card.name: Choujuu Gigaku
card.text: Whenever you cast your first spell during each opponent's turn, goad up to three target creatures that player controls. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)

card.name: A Discerning Customer
card.text: In that case, I'll be blunt — Whenever a land you control enters, create a Food token. Where did you get this third-rate swill? — Whenever you sacrifice a Food, each opponent loses 3 life.

card.name: Mamizou, Ever Watching
card.text: When Mamizou enters, for each player, choose up to one other nonland permanent they control. Return the chosen permanents to their owner's hands. Whenever you cast a spell, create a 1/1 black and red Youkai creature token.

card.name: Mizuchi, Traitor to Humanity
card.text: Lifelink When Mizuchi enters, each player creates a 1/1 black and red Youkai creature token. Casualty of the Great Barrier — When Mizuchi dies, each opponent sacrifices a nontoken creature of their choice. Each player who can't discards a card.

card.name: Mysterious Medicine Merchant
card.text: When Mysterious Medicine Merchant enters, each other creature you control gains persist until end of turn. (When it dies, if it had no -1/-1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a -1/-1 counter on it.) Discard a card: Remove all counters from target creature you control.

card.name: Raiko, Guest Drummer
card.text: Double strike Bards you control have "Whenever an ability of this creature triggers, you may copy it and you may choose new targets for the copy. Do this only once each turn."

card.name: Reimu, Spirits' Grudge
card.text: Ward—Pay 5 life. Reimu enters with an additional +1/+1 counter for each other Spirit you control and each Spirit in your graveyard. Whenever a creature dealt damage by Reimu this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on her, then each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Tenshi, Earthbound
card.text: Basic lands you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color." Artifact tokens you control have "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 4 life."

card.name: Whitewater Champions
card.text: When Whitewater Champions enter, target nonbasic land becomes an Island for as long as you control this creature. Tap a creature you control with 1 power: Until end of turn, Whitewater Champions can't be blocked.

card.name: Enenra
card.text: When this creature enters, each player loses 3 life unless they sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.

card.name: Great Fairies
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, amass Faeries 3. (Put three +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Faerie. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Faerie Army creature token first.) Other Faeries you control have vigilance.

card.name: Kitsune Impostor
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature attacks, you may have it become a copy of another target creature you control until end of turn, except it's still a 3/2 Fox Youkai and isn't legendary.

card.name: A Little Sin
card.text: Flying Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Magician's Companion
card.text: Wizard spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Wizards you control have "Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast."

card.name: Shadow Mirror
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, any number of target players each mill five cards. Warp {1}{UB} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Spirit Mirror
card.text: Flying You have ward {5}. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {5}.)

card.name: Spirit of the Hakurei Relic
card.text: Orbs, Clerics, and Gods you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Tanuki Impostor
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever you cast a noncreature spell during an opponent's turn, untap this creature. It gains reach until end of turn.

card.name: TORIFUNE Monstrosity
card.text: When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another creature. When you do, this creature deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Iron Rings of Moriya
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and has vigilance and menace. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.) Equip God {0} ({0}: Attach to target God creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Personalized Fortune Slip
card.text: When this artifact enters, choose a legendary creature card name. Spells you cast with the chosen name cost {1} less to cast. Creatures you control with the chosen name get +1/+1.

card.name: Roukanken and Hakurouken
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+2. As long as equipped creature is attacking, it has double strike. Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage, draw a card. Equip {4}

card.name: Stone Cherry
card.text: You may exile a creature card from your graveyard instead of paying this spell's mana cost. When this artifact enters, scry 1, then put a +1/+1 counter on up to one creature you control.

card.name: Ancient Sanctuary
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {G}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Garden of the Sun
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Genbu Ravine
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Hellfire Mantle
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Land of the Backdoor
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Netherworld Gates
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {B}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Probability Space Hypervessel
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {R}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Sea of Tranquility
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Wonderful Heaven
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {W}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Youkai Mountain
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {G}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Copy 2MC
card.text: This token can be used to represent a copy of something else.

card.name: Bird Youkai 2MC
card.text: Flying, vigilance

card.name: Spirit 2MC
card.text: Flying

card.name: Clue 2MC
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Food 2MC
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Final Spell: Last Word
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gets +5/+5 and gains haste until end of turn. Exile that creature at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Dance of Dazzling Iridescence
card.text: Until end of turn, creatures you control are 4/4 and have flying and vigilance.

card.name: Fey Inaba
card.text: Flying {4}{W}{W}: Create three 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens with flying. Activate this ability only once.

card.name: Lyrica, Solo Live // Phantom Noise
card.text:
Flying Lyrica enters with two additional +1/+1 counters on her if a creature you control left the battlefield this turn.
---
Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Spirit Bard // Instant — Adventure

card.name: Matsuyoi-Reflecting Slash
card.text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Untap up to one target creature you control.

card.name: Price of Life
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If mana from a Treasure was spent to cast this spell, that creature also gains indestructible and lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Spirit Sign 「Fantasy Seal」
card.text: Target player sacrifices an attacking creature of their choice. You gain 4 life.

card.name: Urban Legend in Limbo
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create two 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens with flying. II — Until end of turn, whenever a creature you control attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it. III — You may reveal a Legendary card you own from outside the game and put it into your hand.

card.name: Bitch, Get Out Of The Way!
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast while you control an attacking creature. Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Hopeless Masquerade
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Until your next turn, creatures you don't control get -2/-0. II — Draw two cards, then discard a card. III — Another target artifact or enchantment you control becomes a 5/5 Spirit creature in addition to its other types.

card.name: Perfect Freeze
card.text: Kicker—{U}, Tap an untapped Faerie you control. (You may pay an additional {U} and tap an untapped Faerie you control as you cast this spell.) Tap target creature and put three stun counters on it. If this spell was kicked, put nine stun counters on it instead.

card.name: Seamless Ceiling of Kinkaku-ji
card.text: Counter target spell if it's an instant, sorcery, or unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: Spark-Like Flashlight
card.text: (You may cast a legendary instant only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.) Target creature gets -X/-0 until end of turn. Tap it. Its controller mills twice X cards.

card.name: Spellbound Volume
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, scry 2. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Yachie, Irresistable Matriarch // From the Rear
card.text:
Flash Whenever one or more creatures deal combat damage to one of your opponents, the attacking player draws a card.
---
Target creature can't be blocked this turn.

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Dragon Turtle Spirit // Instant — Adventure

card.name: Antinomy of Common Flowers
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — You draw 2 cards and lose 2 life. II — Distribute two +1/+1 counters and a menace counter among up to three target creatures you control. III — Each opponent loses X life and you gain X life, where X is the greatest power among creatures you control.

card.name: Just Dodge It, Bro
card.text: Until end of turn, creatures your opponents control lose hexproof, ward, protection, and indestructible and can't have or gain those abilities.

card.name: Koishi, Right Behind You // Answer the Phone
card.text:
Deathtouch When Koishi enters, you may discard a card. If you do, she gains haste and shadow until end of turn. (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.)
---
You draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Pichuun!
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if it targets a creature that was dealt damage this turn. Destroy target creature.

card.name: Poison Nail 「Undead Murderer」
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life. Target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn.

card.name: Yuuma, Blood Titan
card.text: Indestructible Whenever Yuuma enters or attacks, create two Blood tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.") At the beginning of your end step, you may sacrifice any number of artifacts. You lose X life and put X +1/+1 counters on Yuuma, where X is the number of artifacts sacrificed this way.

card.name: Zombie Fairy
card.text: Flying When this creature dies, each opponent loses 2 life. Create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: For Her Sake
card.text: Surveil 3, then exile the top card of your library. Until your next turn, you may play that card. (To surveil 3, look at the top three cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Full Focus
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls. If excess damage was dealt this way, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Hell's Tokamak
card.text: Add seven {R}. Spend this mana only to cast legendary spells or activate the abilities of legendary permanents.

card.name: Illusionary Dominance
card.text: Target creature gets +3/+1 and gains haste and first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Mob Swarm
card.text: Flying Whenever you attack, amass Faeries 1 (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Faerie. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Faerie Army creature token first.)

card.name: Saki, Charging Matriarch // Devilish Beasts
card.text:
Trample Whenever an attacking creature you control dies, Saki deals 1 damage to each opponent.
---
Create a 3/1 red Wolf Spirit creature token with haste and "This creature must attack each combat if able."

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Pegasus Spirit // Sorcery — Adventure

card.name: Scarlet Weather Rhapsody
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Exile the top three cards of your library. You may play those cards for as long as you control this Saga. II — Add {R}{R}{R}. III — Return up to one card from your graveyard to your hand that's an instant, sorcery, and/or has an Adventure.

card.name: Aerial Combat
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. • Target creature you control deals damage equal to twice its power to target creature you don't control with flying.

card.name: Bumper Crop
card.text: Search your library for a land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Then if you control three or more basic lands, create two Food tokens. (They're artifacts with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Esoterica 「Forgotten Ritual」
card.text: Untap target creature. It gets +3/+3 and gains reach until end of turn.

card.name: Follow Me, Unafraid
card.text: Look at the top seven cards of your library. You may cast any number of creature spells from among them. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Immaterial and Missing Power
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — You gain 4 life. II — Goad two target creatures. (Until your next turn, those creatures attack each combat if able and attack a player other than you if able.) III — The next creature spell you cast this turn costs {G}.

card.name: Monstrous Minions
card.text: Changeling (This card is every creature type.) Trample When this creature enters, choose a creature type. Other creatures you control of the chosen type get +1/+1 and have trample.

card.name: Suika, Tiny Night Parade // Missing Power
card.text:
When Suika enters, create a 1/1 black and red Youkai creature token for each creature you control with a counter on it.
---
Distribute two +1/+1 counters among one or two target creatures.

card.name: Byakuren, Turbo Rider
card.text: Start your engines! (If you have no speed, it starts at 1. It increases once on each of your turns when an opponent loses life. Max speed is 4.) When Byakuren enters, create a 3/2 colorless Vehicle artifact token with crew 1. Max Speed — Byakuren and Vehicles you control get +2/+2 and have vigilance.

card.name: Cirno, Summer Freeze
card.text: Flying Perfect Summer Ice — Whenever Cirno deals combat damage to a player, you may pay {2}. When you do, draw a card, then put a stun counter on up to one target tapped creature.

card.name: Dreamworld Doppelganger
card.text: When Doppelganger enters, look at the top ten cards of your library. You may reveal a Wizard creature or Sumireko planeswalker card from among them, put it into your hand, and put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Doppelganger becomes a copy of the revealed card, except it's 3/3 if it's a creature. Put three loyalty counters on it if it's a planeswalker.

card.name: Flandre, Matara's Ace
card.text: Flying {BR}: Flandre gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Scarlet Nihility — Whenever Flandre deals combat damage to a player, that player sacrifices a permanent with mana value equal to the damage dealt.

card.name: Futo, Plate Breaker
card.text: Firebending 2 (Whenever this creature attacks, add {R}{R}. This mana lasts until end of combat.) Boast — {1}: The next Equipment, Aura, or sorcery spell you cast this turn may be cast as though it had flash. When an Equipment you cast this way enters, attach it to target creature you control. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

card.name: Kasen, the Hermit Sage
card.text: [+2]: Until end of turn, Kasen becomes a 6/6 Demon Mystic creature with indestructible, trample, and haste. (She doesn't lose loyalty while she's not a planeswalker.) [-3]: Exile target nonland permanent. [-5]: You may put a creature card from your hand or graveyard onto the battlefield. It gains indestructible, trample, and haste until end of turn.

card.name: Meiling, Dream Guardian
card.text: Vigilance If noncombat damage would be dealt to Meiling, prevent that damage and put a +1/+1 counter on her.

card.name: Miko, Almighty Tao
card.text: Indestructible Whenever Miko attacks, defending player faces a villainous choice — They lose 3 life and discard a card, or you put two +1/+1 counters on Miko and draw a card.

card.name: Okina, Sage of Doors
card.text: [+1]: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature. It must be blocked this turn if able. [0]: Surveil 3. Create a Blood token. [-7]: Gain control of target creature. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Sakuya, Perfect and Elegant
card.text: Flash Ricochet Knife — When Sakuya enters, copy target activated or triggered ability. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Sanae Kochiya
card.text: Flying Gray Thaumaturgy — Whenever Sanae deals combat damage to an opponent, reveal the top card of your library. Put it onto the battlefield tapped if it's a land. Otherwise, you may cast that card and it costs {2} less to cast.

card.name: Shinki, Ordeal from God
card.text: Whenever you activate a loyalty ability of Shinki, create a 2/2 black Demon creature token with menace. [+1]: Shinki deals 2 damage to any target. [0]: Add three mana in any combination of {R}, {W}, and/or {B}. [-6]: Each opponent sacrifices a creature. Each opponent who can't discards a card. Repeat this process for an artifact and an enchantment.

card.name: Sumireko, Last Occultist
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may remove three loyalty counters from Sumireko. When you do, copy that spell and you may choose new targets for the copy. [+1]: Mill two cards, then draw a card. [0]: Exile Sumireko. Return her to the battlefield under her owner's control at the beginning of the next end step. [-5]: Sumireko deals 5 damage to any target. If a permanent dealt damage this way would die this turn, instead exile it and you may cast it for as long as it remains exiled.

card.name: Yamame, Bright Net in the Dark
card.text: Web-slinging {B}{G} (You may cast this spell for {B}{G} if you also return a tapped creature you control to its owner's hand.) Reach Venom Web — When Yamame enters, put a -1/-1 counter on each tapped creature.

card.name: Youmu, Half-Phantom
card.text: Vigilance When Youmu enters, you may attach an Equipment you control to her. Whenever Youmu deals combat damage while attacking, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: Yukari, Sage of Boundaries
card.text: [+1]: You may tap or untap up to one target creature. Draw a card. [-1]: Return target card from your graveyard to your hand. [-7]: Search your library for a permanent card and put it into the battlefield, then shuffle. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Gun Sign 「3D Printer Gun」
card.text: {7}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Destroy target permanent. {T}, Remove two loyalty counters from a planeswalker you control, Sacrifice this artifact: Destroy target permanent.

card.name: Magician's Broom
card.text: Equipped creature has flying, haste, and prowess. Equip {1}

card.name: Mini-Hakkero
card.text: Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. {1}, {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card, then exile the top card of your library. Until your next turn, you may play the exiled card.

card.name: Otherworld Observer
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may move a counter from another permanent you control onto this creature.

card.name: Spirit 2MC
card.text: Flying

card.name: Spirit 2MC
card.text: Flying

card.name: Demon 2MC
card.text: Menace

card.name: Wolf Spirit 2MC
card.text: This creature must attack each combat if able.

card.name: Blood 2MC
card.text: {1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Vehicle 2MC
card.text: Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Artistic Dedication
card.text: Enchant creature you control Whenever enchanted creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it. If it already has a counter on it, you may draw a card instead.

card.name: Autumnal Waterfall
card.text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Landfall — If a land entered the battlefield under your control this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Countless Native Gods
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: God's Wind
card.text: Target creature gains hexproof until end of turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Hina, Dark Side of Fate
card.text: Trample Exiled Doll — When Hina enters, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment. If you controlled it, draw a card.

card.name: Horizon Sign
card.text: Tiered (Choose one additional cost) • Secretly Inherited Art — {0} — Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. • The Day the Sea Split — {2} — Search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. • Yasaka's Divine Wind — {4}{G} — Return each land card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Hunt for Trespassers
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to another target creature. If a tapped creature was dealt damage this way, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Incident Resolvers (MoF)
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card. Spells you cast during combat cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Kanako, Avatar of Mountains
card.text: Reach Divine Virtues of the Wind God — Whenever a land you control enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain flying until end of turn. You may play land cards from your graveyard.

card.name: Nitori, Candid Friend
card.text: Reach Kappa's Pororoca — When Nitori enters, draw two cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Patrol of Nine Heavens
card.text: Vigilance This creature can't be blocked by legendary creatures.

card.name: Suwako, Old God of Moriya
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each land card in your graveyard. Froggy Braves the Wind — Whenever Suwako attacks, untap up to three lands.

card.name: Aya, Closest Available Responder
card.text: Flash Flying When Aya enters, choose one — • Tap target creature. • Untap target creature. • Draw a card.

card.name: Treasure 2MC
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Marisa, Ordinary Magician
card.text: Flying The Grimoire of Marisa — Whenever Marisa attacks, exile up to one instant or sorcery card from your hand or graveyard, then copy each spell exiled with her. You may cast the copies.

card.name: Road of Liminality
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a land card with a basic land type, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
